system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_tinhphoi_htr_createnew","body":"CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_TINHPHOI_HTR_CREATENEW]
(
	@madonhang nvarchar(max)
)
AS
DECLARE @DONHANG TABLE
(
	masp nvarchar(200),
	soluong_donhang int
)

INSERT INTO @DONHANG(masp, soluong_donhang)
SELECT
	masp = CASE WHEN ISNULL(B.masp, '') = '' THEN dbo.ufn_MaHTR_To_MaSP(B.chitiet) ELSE B.masp END, 
	SUM(B.soluong)
FROM tr_dondathang A
INNER JOIN tr_dondathang_chitiet B ON A.maddh = B.maddh
WHERE A.active = 1 AND A.trangthai NOT IN ('-1')
	AND A.maddh IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM dbo.fn_Split(@madonhang, ','))
GROUP BY CASE WHEN ISNULL(B.masp, '') = '' THEN dbo.ufn_MaHTR_To_MaSP(B.chitiet) ELSE B.masp END

SELECT *
INTO #TINHPHOI_CHITIET
FROM tr_tinhphoi_chitiet
WHERE 0 = 1

SELECT A.masp, A.stt, A.mact, A.chitiet, A.nguyenlieu,
	A.dayy_tc, A.rong_tc, A.dai_tc, A.soluong_tc,
	soluong_can = (A.soluong_tc * B.soluong_donhang),
	sokhoi_tc = CASE 
			WHEN A.nguyenlieu = '' OR A.nguyenlieu = '0' THEN 0 
			ELSE (A.dayy_tc * A.rong_tc * A.dai_tc * A.soluong_tc * B.soluong_donhang) / 1000000000
		END,
	dayy_sc = IIF(A.dayy_tc > 0, A.dayy_tc + 1, 0),
	rong_sc = IIF(A.rong_tc > 0, A.rong_tc + 1, 0),
	dai_sc = IIF(A.dai_tc > 0, A.dai_tc, 0),
	C.sokhoi_phoi_tructiep, 
	A.phoi_tructiep, 
	phoi_ghep_ngang = CAST(0 AS bit), 
	A.phoi_ghep_finger,
	C.so_tam, C.so_phach, 
	ghepthanh = CAST(0 AS bit), 
	gheptam = CAST(1 AS bit),
	C.dayy_ghepthanh, C.rong_ghepthanh, C.dai_ghepthanh, C.sothanh, C.boiso_ghepthanh, C.sokhoi_ghepngang, 
	C.dayy_gheptam, C.rong_gheptam, C.dai_gheptam, C.sotam_ghep, C.boiso_gheptam, C.sokhoi_gheptam, 
	phoi_giacong_ngoai = CAST(0 AS bit),
	A.idTieuChuanPhoi, 
	gioihan_boiso_tam = CAST(1 AS bit),
    D.hehang
FROM tr_dinhmuc_govan A
	INNER JOIN @DONHANG B ON A.masp = B.masp
    INNER JOIN tr_sanpham D ON A.masp = D.masp
	LEFT JOIN #TINHPHOI_CHITIET C ON A.masp = C.masp
WHERE A.mact NOT IN ('000')
ORDER BY A.masp, A.stt

DROP TABLE #TINHPHOI_CHITIET","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.fn_split","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhphoi_chitiet"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
